calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-08-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that this is a second amendment to the second amended petition and that it has been trying to get Counsel to come up with proposed Trusts. The Court granted the Second Amended Petition for First and final Report of Executor, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-18-2018 Continued To Jul-24-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-23-2018 Continued To Jul-18-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Heather Stoneman for Petitioner

The Court noted the petition for Final Distribution does not address Trust terms. Ms. Stoneman stated the will was silent, the siblings are holding the funds to help pay the bills for the other siblings, and the money will be depleted in 1-2 years. The Second Amended Petition for First and Final Report, etc. is continued to July 18, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of an amended petition to include terms.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-15-2018 Continued To May-23-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-01-2018 Continued To May-15-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-10-2018 Continued To May-01-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Heather Stoneman for and with Sarah Rush (Petitioner)

The Court noted that this matter is on calendar for no response to the Probate Examiner's notes and no notice to the person who requested special notice. Ms. Stoneman stated that the Request for Special Notice was filed by the City (San Francisco), the City's debt has been paid, that it was paid twice, she is waiting for a refund, and can file a waiver of notice. The Order to Appear is Off Calendar. The Petition for First and Final Report of Executor, etc. is continued to May 1, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Apr-10-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-28-2018 Continued To Mar-27-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney to appear on March 27, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why they have not responded to the Probate Examiner's notes. The Petition for First and Final Report of Executor, etc. is also continued to that date. The Court will consider appropriate sanctions in light of repeated failures to appear in this case.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney to appear on January 17, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why they have failed to file a response to the Probate Examiner's notes. The Petition for First and Final Report of Executor, etc. is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Heather Stoneman for Sarah Heegaard (Executor).

Ms. Stoneman stated that due to her Client dealing with medical issues and traveling, she was having trouble locating the power of attorney, and that she just received it yesterday. The Petition for First and Final Report of Executor, etc. is continued to August 2, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Stoneman to respond to the Probate Examiner's notes.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-22-2017 Continued To Mar-13-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Heather Stoneman for Petitioner.

Ms. Stoneman that there was an office error and the matter was never calendared, that the petition is 99% done and that it will be filed within one week. Status on close of the estate is continued to March 13, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Order to Appear is off calendar.
